falsification_conditions.condition: The S&P 500 index closes above 5000 (key resistance level) within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A clear bullish breakout contradicts the HOLD signal and invalidates the bottom pattern assumption

falsification_conditions.condition: The 20-day moving average of the S&P 500 crosses above the 50-day moving average by 2% or more
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: This would indicate a confirmed bullish trend, directly opposing the current UNKNOWN/ HOLD verdict

falsification_conditions.condition: The pattern match percentage drops below 60% as measured by the macro engine's algorithm
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: Significant divergence from the historical bottom_2024_aug pattern would invalidate the current pattern-based analysis

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
